form.formComment: Recent form sound. Comes here off a 35-day let-up. Most recently rolled along in front then was edged out late 2nd of 11 at this track on March 2 over 1400m, 0.5 len behind Mokomoko carrying 54kg at $7.50. The run before that 2nd of 14 at this track on January 4 over 1400m, 1.0 len behind Horse One carrying 54kg at $42.20. Has to be considered.

form.formComment: Last start 7th of 12 at Urawa on March 16 over 1400m, 9 len behind Riko Mica carrying 54kg at $226.50. The race before that second last of 10 at this track on March 2 over 1400m, 14 len behind Amrta with 54kg at $203.80. Draws well but predicted to struggle.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up previously. Comes off a 62 day let-up. Resuming ran last of 12 at this track on December 15 over 1400m, 12 len behind Party Girl carrying 56kg at $18.20. Second run from a spell set the pace for much of the race 2nd of 13 at this track on February 3 over 1400m, 1.5 len behind Miyabi Cry carrying 56kg at $5.30. One of the main contenders.

form.formComment: Having second run back today. Last run got back early 8th of 11 at this track on March 2 over 1400m, 9 len behind Mokomoko with 54kg at $67.10. form.formComment: Returns from a 35-day let-up. At the latest run eased back early on 6th of 10 at this track on March 2 over 1400m, 8 len behind Amrta with 56kg at $9.70. The start before that got back early 8th of 13 at this track on January 2 over 1500m, 8 len behind Tamamo Krieger with 56kg at $22.60. Will need plenty of improvement to feature.

form.formComment: Last start couldn't go on with it; 8th of 12 at Funabashi on March 12 over 1200m, 6 len behind The Big Man carrying 56kg at $5.20. The race before that tracked the speed and boxed on steadily 5th of 11 at this track on March 2 over 1400m, 6 len behind Mokomoko carrying 56kg at $2.40. Genuine chance this time around.

form.formComment: Comes here off a 33-day let-up. Most recently 5th of 14 at this track on March 4 over 1500m, 9 len behind Ciel La Victoire with 54kg at $114.60. The run before that got back early 9th of 14 at Funabashi on February 9 over 1600m, 16 len behind G T Pharaoh with 54kg at $203. Will need to improve many lengths to feature.

form.formComment: Back after a long spell. Finished off last campaign favourite; ran on from midfield and won by 2.5 len at this track October 13 over 1400m defeating Symbol The Sun with 54kg at $2. Won previous preparation first up favourite; won by 2.5 len at this track May 16 over 1400m defeating Oden Rickey with 54kg at $2.60. Likely to play a major role.

form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up previously. First-up 3rd of 12 at this track on February 4 over 1400m, 0.6 len behind Bel Leone carrying 54kg at $14.60. Last start won by a neck at this track March 3 over 1400m defeating Ailes La Victoire carrying 54kg at $5.10. Well placed. Should prove hard to beat.

form.formComment: Back from a spell. Finished off last preparation sixth of 13 at this track February 2 over 1400m, 5 len behind Bel Air King with 56kg at $13.30. First up last campaign sixth of 12 at this track August 22 over 1500m, 6 len behind Pod Sol with 53kg at $132.80. Win would surprise.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Comes here off a 34-day let-up. Most recently favourite; tracked the speed and boxed on steadily; won by 3 len at this track March 3 over 1400m defeating Shingun Armet carrying 56kg at $2.40. The race before that 2nd of 12 at this track on February 4 over 1400m, 0.5 len behind Taisei Adamas with 53kg at $5.50. Can get the job done again.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after four months 7th of 14 at this track on March 4 over 1500m, 12 len behind Ciel La Victoire carrying 53kg at $6.70. Previously second-up 2nd of 8 at this track on March 4 2025 over 1400m, 2 len behind Mistra carrying 51kg at $39. One of the top chances.
